sections.paragraph: an unused root, pr. to scratch, to scrape, a notion found in many roots beginning with גר, as imitating the sound of scraping, see גָּרַד , גָּרַם , גָּרַן , גָּרַע , גָּרַר . It is afterwards applied to roughness (see גָּרָה , גָּרַל ). Arab. جَرِبَ to be scabby, جَرَبُ scab; Syr. ܓܪܶܒܐܳ leprosy; Germ. Kräße, kraßen.
